short_summary: Iran deal close; gang leader killed
rationale: US-Iran deal remains the dominant story with direct policy and market implications; Trump's claim of killing a Venezuelan gang leader is a notable domestic security/foreign policy event.

top_events.title: US and Iran signal peace deal within reach
top_events.summary: Trump administration signals an Iran deal is close, which could lower oil prices and reduce US military exposure in the Middle East — directly relevant to American consumers and taxpayers.

top_events.title: Trump claims US strike killed Tren de Aragua gang boss
top_events.summary: US military or intelligence strike reportedly killed the leader of a violent Venezuelan gang active inside the US, a direct domestic security development affecting American communities.

top_events.title: Canadian mother sues OpenAI over AI-linked suicide
top_events.summary: High-profile AI liability lawsuit adds pressure for US regulatory action on AI safety, potentially affecting major US tech companies and the broader AI industry.
